material.title: 部件 II：极致艰苦工作

source_scope.coverage_note: This contract covers only part II, sourced from EPUB members v101-13.xhtml through v101-18.xhtml and the existing part II ReaderLab page.

local_deepread.covered_unit: 部件 II：极致艰苦工作
local_deepread.reading_thesis: This unit is not merely about working hard; it describes a hard-problem execution system: responsibility, deep understanding, frontline exposure, high-density teams, short-path communication, deletion before optimization, speed, and manufacturing capability.

reading_route.title: 责任和深度理解
reading_route.purpose: Read CEO responsibility as problem ownership, not status.

reading_route.title: 团队和组织
reading_route.purpose: Connect talent density, goal alignment, and communication structure to product quality.

reading_route.title: 算法之道
reading_route.purpose: Treat deletion before automation as the main transferable method atom.

reading_route.title: 速度和制造
reading_route.purpose: Separate correct-direction acceleration from blind urgency, then connect manufacturing to durable capability.

distillation_candidates.claim: Before optimizing or automating a process, first challenge the requirement and delete unnecessary parts.
distillation_candidates.applicability_boundary: Useful for process, product, or organization design reviews; risky if used to delete regulatory, safety, or human-context requirements without domain review.

claim_refs.evidence_note: Primary support comes from the reader page original-text section for the algorithm steps and the detailed delete-before-automate explanation; the distillation page is only a derived comparison point.

distillation_candidates.claim: Communication should travel directly to the person who can solve the problem rather than through status-preserving layers.
distillation_candidates.applicability_boundary: Useful for cross-functional execution bottlenecks; still needs judgment where accountability, audit, or safety gates matter.

claim_refs.evidence_note: Primary support is the original-text section on direct cross-department and shortest-path communication; the derived distillation page is not the main evidence.

distillation_candidates.claim: Manufacturing and delivery systems are part of the product, not a downstream afterthought.
distillation_candidates.applicability_boundary: Most relevant to physical production, operations, infrastructure, or repeatable delivery systems; not every creative or research task has a factory-like layer.

claim_refs.evidence_note: Primary support is the part II reader page original-text sections on factory-as-product and manufacturing bottlenecks; the distillation page is only an auxiliary derived artifact.

misread_guards: Do not reduce the unit to generic hustle culture.
Do not treat extreme emergency work patterns as normal operating advice.
Do not promote candidate skills without item-level source review and separate human acceptance.

claim_refs.claim: Before optimizing or automating a process, first challenge the requirement and delete unnecessary parts.
claim_refs.applicability_boundary: Useful for process, product, or organization design reviews; risky if used to delete regulatory, safety, or human-context requirements without domain review.

claim_refs.claim: Communication should travel directly to the person who can solve the problem rather than through status-preserving layers.
claim_refs.applicability_boundary: Useful for cross-functional execution bottlenecks; still needs judgment where accountability, audit, or safety gates matter.

claim_refs.applicability_boundary: Most relevant to physical production, operations, infrastructure, or repeatable delivery systems; not every creative or research task has a factory-like layer.

basis: The part II page includes source file markers, original text, a reading map, and local interpretation.
Distillation candidates are limited to the locally covered part and now point first to reader-page original-text spans.
known_uncertainties: This local deepread has not been checked against the complete book's later case chapters.
Claim refs are narrowed to reader-page line ranges, but exact EPUB char offsets have not been computed.

review_items.question: Does the reading thesis preserve enough first-hand content, or does it over-compress the unit into management advice?
Do the candidate method atoms need exact EPUB span refs before any future Skill draft?
